core_mechanism: resonant energy exchange between a translational (kinetic) degree of freedom and internal vibrational normal modes during collisions of localized coherent excitations, producing multi-bounce resonance windows and a self-similar/fractal dependence of the collision outcome (escape, capture/bion, or annihilation) on the initial velocity, reducible to motion in a low-dimensional effective potential
brief_reason: The abstract reports a fractal cartography of multi-bounce resonance windows and an effective-potential classification scheme linking vibrational modes to outcomes, which is the signature of resonant energy transfer between translational and internal modes captured by a collective-coordinate effective potential.
